title: Lead Investment Banker at United India Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at United India Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, United India Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About United India Insurance:
United India Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance!
